summary: The diff implements 7 out of 8 requirements. REQ-12 (backend Restaurant type with address field) is fully implemented with migration support. REQ-13 (restaurant registration backend function) is complete. REQ-14 (restaurant registration form page) is implemented with authentication, validation, and navigation. REQ-15 (RestaurantCard address display) is complete. REQ-16 (backend menu item function with price and image URL) is implemented. REQ-17 (MenuItemCard image display with placeholder) is complete with loading states. REQ-18 (menu management interface) is mostly complete but lacks explicit owner authentication checks in the backend - the frontend shows the interface to all authenticated users without verifying they own the restaurant.

missing_requirements.requirement: Interface is accessible only to the restaurant owner who registered it
missing_requirements.reason: The ManageMenuPage frontend requires authentication but does not verify the user is the restaurant owner. The backend addMenuItem function in main.mo does not appear to check if the caller owns the restaurant before allowing menu item additions.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module for upgrading old data structures to new ones with address, category, available, and imageUrl fields
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify data migration as a requirement. The migration.mo file includes comprehensive conversion logic for OldRestaurant, OldMenuItem, OldOrder types to new types with default values.

hallucinated_features.description: URL parameter utility functions for parsing and managing URL parameters including session storage persistence
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention URL parameter handling utilities. The urlParams.ts file provides functions like getUrlParameter, storeSessionParameter, getPersistedUrlParameter, and clearParamFromHash with no corresponding requirement.
